verified_by.message: Reviewer walked the 8-item checklist: 7 items clear, 1 item unclear (Q7: distinguishing synthesised edges from native ones). Per the protocol's pass criterion (≥3 unclear fails), B2 passes. The Q7 finding is captured as informational follow-up — the synthesised-edge dashed-stroke cue is too subtle without a legend.

threshold.ceiling: port in [1024,65535]; default derived from 'manifold' (e.g. T9 'MFLD'=6353 or 'MANI'=6264); not in common-conflict set {3000,3001,4200,5000,5173,8000,8080,8443,9000}

validation_criteria: Initial HTML+critical-JS+critical-CSS payload ≤ 500 KB gzipped
Graph engine and additional manifold detail are loaded as separate JS chunks served from the same embedded asset map
Service worker pre-caches every chunk on first install so offline (U3) is preserved

propagation_effects.note: Critical-path budget achievable once heavy chunks are deferred
Build step must enumerate every chunk into the embedded map; no chunk may be CDN-resolved at runtime
Graph view appears after a small lazy-load delay on first visit (within first-load PWA install window)

validation_criteria: CLI binary stamps its own version into served HTML (e.g. <meta name='manifold-version'>) at request time
Service worker keys its cache namespace on that version string
Restarting the CLI from a newer binary causes the next browser visit to invalidate the previous cache and load fresh assets

propagation_effects.note: Asset bundle must include a version-aware service worker template; embedded assets cannot be fully static for all of HTML
Resolution gives O3 a concrete mechanism rather than 'TBD'

validation_criteria: If default port is bound, CLI prints the conflict, suggests `--port <n>`, and exits non-zero
Error message includes a kernel-suggested free port (queried via ephemeral bind) when available
Successful start prints the URL `http://127.0.0.1:<port>` to stdout

propagation_effects.note: Failure path probes for a free port to suggest, slightly more code than a bare error
Memorable default no longer needs to be globally collision-free; collisions are degraded gracefully

validation_criteria: GFM features (tables, fenced code, task lists, autolinks) render correctly
Fenced ```mermaid blocks render via a dedicated Mermaid component, not raw HTML
Embedded raw <script>, inline event handlers, and javascript: URIs are stripped before render
Sanitiser test corpus (XSS payloads from OWASP cheat sheet) renders no executing code

propagation_effects.note: Rich GFM + Mermaid expands narrative expressivity within the safe set
Mermaid runtime adds bundle weight; mitigated by deferring to lazy chunk per TN1

validation_criteria: Renderer accepts a manifold whose constraint_graph is absent or empty without throwing
When constraint_graph is empty, edges are synthesised from tension `between[]` (conflict) and anchor `derived_from[]` (satisfies)
Synthesised graphs render with the same layout pipeline as native v3 graphs

propagation_effects.note: Renderer needs an edge-synthesis layer in addition to direct binding

validation_criteria: /api/manifolds returns metadata only (feature, phase, outcome, constraint counts) — never full constraint arrays or Markdown
/api/manifolds/<feature> returns full JSON+Markdown content lazily on selection
Index payload size scales linearly with manifold count and stays under the lightweight budget for ≤ 100 manifolds

propagation_effects.note: Switching manifolds incurs a one-shot fetch; mitigated by SW caching after first read

validation_criteria: CLI exposes its package.json version (already imported in cli/index.ts) to the HTTP handler
Server injects that version into served HTML as a meta tag and into a Cache-Control / ETag header
Service worker reads the meta tag at registration time and uses it as the cache namespace key

evidence.test_name: all three versions load through the same call
synthesises conflict edges from tension between

evidence.note: Path updated in iteration 10: ConstraintGraph.svelte was deleted during the Cytoscape→d3-sankey redesign and replaced by BackwardSankey.svelte.

evidence.message: Cross-audience walkthrough completed: BackwardSankey nodes/edges/binding-pin are legible (Q2, Q3, Q6 all clear); Q7 (synthesised vs native edge differentiation) flagged as unclear — informational follow-up.

evidence.test_name: backward Sankey renders an SVG flow with constraint and RT nodes
OWASP corpus stripped (script, event handlers, javascript:, data: URIs)
manifold-version header on every embedded asset response
the built service worker bakes in the CLI version as its cache namespace

evidence.message: index.html (0.36 kB gz) + index-*.js (15.67 kB gz) + index-*.css (1.01 kB gz) = ~17.04 kB gz, well under 500 kB. Heavy chunks (graph-engine 176 kB gz, markdown 50 kB gz) are correctly lazy-loaded.

evidence.test_name: default port is not in the common-conflict set
exits non-zero and suggests an alternate port when target is bound

binding_constraint.reason: RT-1 (embedded asset bundle) is the foundation: every client-side RT (RT-6 graph, RT-7 markdown, RT-8 PWA shell, RT-9 cache versioning, RT-10 bundle split) presupposes that assets ship in the binary. m2 already flagged T1 as the blocker for both O3 and U1. Until the build-and-embed pipeline exists, no other client-side work can be exercised end-to-end.

tension_validation.note: Vite chunking + Svelte 5 compiler output keep critical bundle ≤ 500 KB gz; Cytoscape + Mermaid lazy-loaded as separate chunks.
Static-assets + dynamic-meta strategy is framework-agnostic; Svelte template renders the version meta tag at request time.
Port handling lives in the CLI command, independent of the web stack.
rehype-sanitize on the Svelte side; beautiful-mermaid (already a dep) renders fenced ```mermaid blocks.
Edge synthesis runs in cli/lib (server-side) before serialisation; client receives a uniform graph regardless of source schema.
Two-tier API surface implemented in serve.ts; client lazy-fetches detail by feature name.
pkg.version is already imported in cli/index.ts; CLI passes it to the HTTP handler and into the served HTML.

solution_options.name: Vanilla TS + Cytoscape.js + esbuild
solution_options.note: Smallest possible critical bundle. No framework lock-in. Markdown rendering would need a hand-rolled allowlist sanitiser since there's no Svelte/React tooling to lean on.

solution_options.name: Svelte 5 + vis-network + Vite
solution_options.note: Excellent dev velocity given project's existing Svelte 5 best-practice skills. vis-network is heavier than Cytoscape and harder to keep under the 500 KB critical-bundle target without aggressive code-splitting.

solution_options.name: Svelte 5 + d3-sankey + Vite
solution_options.note: Hybrid: Svelte 5 runes for the narrative spine + UI shell (matches project's Svelte5 best-practice skills, compact runtime), d3-sankey for backward-reasoning flow (Constraints → RTs → Outcome — drastically smaller than the originally-considered Cytoscape force layout, ~2.9 KB gz lazy chunk). Vite for chunking + service-worker generation. Recommended. (Originally recorded with Cytoscape.js; switched to d3-sankey post-D3a — see docs/manifold-serve/DECISIONS.md.)

draft_required_truths.draft_statement: A build step bundles all HTML/CSS/JS/font assets into the CLI binary before release.
The HTTP server exposes only GET handlers and reads exclusively from the embedded asset map and pre-parsed in-memory manifold list.
A canonical default port is chosen at compile time (one of {6264, 6353}) and validated absent from the common-conflict allowlist.
A graph visualisation library that supports nodes, multi-edge types, and panning/zooming on ~50 nodes is selected and embedded.
A web app manifest and a service worker that pre-caches all embedded assets are shipped with the bundle.
The HTTP listener defaults to host 127.0.0.1; opting into a non-loopback host requires an explicit flag and emits a stderr warning.
The Markdown renderer used to display manifold prose strips/sandboxes embedded HTML and disallows script execution.
The service worker cache is keyed on the CLI binary version so binary upgrades invalidate stale assets.
Manifold parsing tolerates missing v3-only fields (constraint_graph, iterations, convergence) when the input declares schema_version 1 or 2.

iterations.result: Discovered 17 constraints across 5 categories from outcome statement; pre-mortem added 1 operational constraint (PWA cache invalidation on binary upgrade).

Identified 7 tensions, all resolved via TRIZ-guided strategies (4 trade_off, 1 resource_tension, 2 hidden_dependency); propagation checks recorded; one cascade-tightened constraint (T4) is mitigated by chunked-bundle resolution.

Derived 12 required truths via backward reasoning; identified RT-1 (embedded asset bundle) as binding constraint; recommended Option C (Svelte 5 + Cytoscape.js + Vite); all 7 tensions CONFIRMED under recommended option.

Generated 28 artifacts under Option C: 6 server-side modules, 1 CLI command + 1 wiring edit, 11 web frontend files, 1 build script, 6 test files, 2 docs, 1 runbook. Every required truth advanced from NOT_SATISFIED/SPECIFICATION_READY to PARTIAL — fully VERIFIED status awaits build (RT-1 final assets) and test runs (RT-2..RT-12).

PARTIAL convergence. 24/24 declared artifacts present on disk. 14/14 content_match evidence items VERIFIED. Test suite: 34 pass, 1 skip, 0 fail. 6/17 constraints SATISFIED (T2, T3, T5, U4, S1, S3); 11 PARTIAL across 3 invariants and 8 boundaries/goals. 3 blocking gaps (G1: build pipeline, G2: install cli/web deps, G3: PWA offline test). Phase remains GENERATED — invariants T1/U3/S2 must reach TESTED level before VERIFIED.

CONVERGED. User closed all 3 blocking gaps: cli/web bundle built (12 files, 775.8 KB embedded — critical chunk ~17 KB gz), cli/web deps installed (sanitiser test now runs and passes 5/5 OWASP corpus), PWA SW + manifest emitted by Vite. Live smoke test confirms manifold serve boots, returns the project index at /api/manifolds, and stamps manifold-version=2.31.3 into served HTML. Test suite: 39 pass, 0 skip, 0 fail. All 6 INVARIANTs at TESTED level. Phase advanced to VERIFIED.

Closed G4–G10. Added 4 Bun tests (perf, collision, shutdown, sw-cache) + 2 Playwright e2e files (visualiser, sw-cache-flip) + Playwright config + LEGIBILITY-REVIEW.md template. Bun-side suite: 46 pass / 0 fail / 206 expect() calls. Playwright suite discovers 6 tests under chromium (one-time `bunx playwright install chrome` required to run). All 17 constraints now SATISFIED at TESTED or higher; the qualitative B2 has VERIFIED-eligible manual_review evidence template.

Re-verified after three out-of-band redesign rounds (Cytoscape → d3-sankey, cards-then-narrative → emergence-ordered accordion spine, theme system with Apple Dark/Light + Nord + pluggable registry). All 17 constraints still SATISFIED at TESTED level; B2 strengthened by the redesigns and theme system; T4 bundle headroom improved (graph chunk 176→2.9 KB gz). 1 stale evidence pattern detected (cytoscape → d3-sankey) and updated. 14 new artifacts added on disk and now declared in generation.artifacts; 3 deleted artifacts removed. 46 Bun tests pass; Playwright now discovers 10 tests (was 6). Built CSS uses 115 theme tokens with 0 hardcoded hex.

Surgical anchor patch (no structural change): Option C's library label corrected from 'Svelte 5 + Cytoscape.js + Vite' to 'Svelte 5 + d3-sankey + Vite' in both JSON anchors.solution_options[2] and the ## Solution Space section of the Markdown, reflecting the post-launch redesign documented in docs/manifold-serve/DECISIONS.md D3a. Required truths, maps_to chains, binding constraint, recommendation, and tension validations all unchanged. Phase deliberately NOT regressed from VERIFIED — this was a label correction, not a re-anchoring.

Full evidence-aware verify (--verify-evidence --run-tests). Ran the Bun test suite (46 pass / 0 fail / 206 expect) and propagated results back into RT.evidence — 8 test_passes items flipped PENDING → VERIFIED. Fixed RT-6 stale evidence path (ConstraintGraph.svelte → BackwardSankey.svelte; the original was deleted in iteration 8). Added test_tier classifications (unit / integration / e2e) and verified_by/verified_at metadata to every test_passes evidence. Added the Playwright e2e spec for U1/RT-6 as STALE-tier evidence (suite configured + tests discovered, just not executed in this pass). Result: 12/12 RT statuses now SATISFIED (was 4/12); manifest staleness flagged at iter 8/9 m-status now resolved. Phase remains VERIFIED.

playwright.reason: Browser install required (`bunx playwright install chrome`); marked STALE.

iterations.result: Playwright e2e suite executed: 10/10 passed in 20.8s. RT-6's E19b evidence promoted STALE → VERIFIED. Constraint-level satisfaction levels lifted from TESTED to VERIFIED for 14 of 17 constraints — every constraint whose rts_supporting does NOT include RT-6 now has every evidence item with status VERIFIED + test passed. Three constraints stay at TESTED level: T4 and U1 (both include RT-6 with pending manual_review E19), and B2 (qualitative; awaits LEGIBILITY-REVIEW.md walkthrough). Phase remains VERIFIED. Convergence remains CONVERGED.

constraints_held_at_tested.reason: rts_supporting includes RT-6 which has pending manual_review E19
rts_supporting includes RT-6 which has pending manual_review E19

iterations.result: Cross-audience legibility walkthrough completed per docs/manifold-serve/LEGIBILITY-REVIEW.md. Score: 7/8 clear, 1/8 unclear (Q7: synthesised vs native edge differentiation). Per the protocol's pass threshold (≥3 unclear fails), B2 passes. RT-6's E19 manual_review flipped PENDING → VERIFIED; B2 gained a constraint-level `verified_by` array with the same evidence. The three constraints previously held at TESTED (B2, T4, U1) all flip to VERIFIED. Final state: 17/17 constraints at level VERIFIED. Phase remains VERIFIED. One informational follow-up logged: the Q7 finding suggests adding a small legend to BackwardSankey.svelte distinguishing dashed (synthesised) from solid (native) edges — non-blocking UX polish.

unclear_items.follow_up: Add a legend to BackwardSankey.svelte explaining that dashed edges are synthesised (derived from tension between[] / anchor maps_to) and solid edges are native (from constraint_graph.edges).

removed_artifacts.reason: Replaced by BackwardSankey.svelte during the Cytoscape→d3-sankey redesign.
Replaced by ConstraintsPanel.svelte (accordion-list grouped by category) during the spine redesign.
Standalone narrative pane removed; per-element prose now rendered inline in each accordion via MarkdownInline.svelte.

second_pass.trigger: User asked to close G4–G10 from the verify report.

Add cli/web/ Svelte 5 + Vite frontend project
reversibility_log.one_way_consequence: Reverting to Option A (vanilla TS) requires rewriting all components without rune syntax.

reversibility_log.description: Add scripts/build-web.ts and check in cli/lib/embedded-assets.generated.ts
Add cli/web dependencies (cytoscape, cytoscape-fcose, unified, rehype-sanitize, vite-plugin-pwa, svelte 5)
reversibility_log.one_way_consequence: Removing these post-install requires re-implementing graph rendering and MD sanitisation.

convergence.summary: All 17 constraints SATISFIED at TESTED level (or VERIFIED-eligible for B2 via manual_review template). 6 INVARIANTs ✓, 5 BOUNDARYs ✓, 6 GOALs ✓. Bun-side test suite 46 pass / 0 fail; Playwright suite 6 tests discovered. Binding constraint RT-1 closed.

gap_checklist_compliance.note: Core data path: .manifold/*.{json,md} → in-memory parse → GET /api/manifolds → embedded SPA renderer. Single process boundary (HTTP loopback). Covered by T2, T5.

gap_checklist_compliance.skip_reason: No authentication or cryptographic primitives; loopback-only server with read-only data.

gap_checklist_compliance.note: Listener bound to 127.0.0.1 (S1) limits resource-exhaustion exposure to local user; payload bound (T4) limits initial transfer.

gap_checklist_compliance.skip_reason: No outbound HTTP dependencies — all assets embedded (T1).

gap_checklist_compliance.note: Schema validation tolerates v1/v2/v3 (T5); Markdown sanitisation prevents script injection from authored content (S2).
Multiple browser tabs sharing the listener — read-only handlers (T2) make concurrent reads safe; no shared mutable state.
